mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.name AS spotName, s.lat, s.lng, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, s.experience FROM spots s
WHERE s.active = 1 AND s.experience = #{experience} ORDER BY s.name ASC

SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.experience, s.name AS spotName, s.lat, s.lng, s.region, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, mf.time_slot AS timeSlot, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, mf.weather, mf.tide, CASE WHEN fs.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorite, CAST(mf.metrics AS CHAR) AS metrics, CAST(mf.raw_data AS CHAR) AS rawData FROM spots s
LEFT JOIN favorite_spots fs ON fs.spot_id = s.id AND fs.user_id = #{userId} WHERE s.active = 1 AND s.id = #{spotId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO favorite_spots (spot_id, user_id) VALUES (#{spotId}, #{userId})
